case_title: DUCKSWORTH, KIMBERLY VS ALFARO, CAROL DBA PARAGON MANAGEMENT GROUP et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUCKSWORTH, KIMBERLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALFARO, CAROL DBA PARAGON MANAGEMENT GROUP $1,459.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,459.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27829 ON 3/23/05. NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,042.00 FILED BY DUCKSWORTH, KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT ALFARO, CAROL DBA PARAGON MANAGEMENT GROUP ALFARO, ANDY DBA PARAGON MANAGEMENT GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-09-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-07-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUCKSWORTH, KIMBERLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALFARO, CAROL DBA PARAGON MANAGEMENT GROUP ALFARO, ANDY DBA PARAGON MANAGEMENT GROUP $1,410.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,410.00, CONCURRENT WITH PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF WILL RETURN CHECK #2183 (BANK OF AMERICA) IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 TO DEFENDANTS.
